urdu transliteration text:
Jab Ridaa Sar Se Chhini, Mai Sadaa Deti Rahi,
Tu Na Aaya Ghazi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: When my veil was being snatched,I kept crying out aloud,but you did not come O’ Warrior (Abbas)

urdu transliteration text:
Aale-Imraan Kahaan, Aur Zindaan KahaanYe Behen Qaid Huwi, Tu Na Aaya Ghazi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Where is the family of Imran (Abu Talib)? And where is the prison? Your sister was imprisoned, but you did not come O’ Warrior (Abbas)

urdu transliteration text:
Jab Ridaa Sar Se Chhini, Mai Sadaa Deti Rahi,
Tu Na Aaya Ghazi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: When my veil was being snatched,I kept crying out aloud,but you did not come O’ Warrior (Abbas)

urdu transliteration text:
Hamko Paani Na Mile, Teri Khushbu Toh RaheTere Baazu Na Kate, Chaahe Mashkiza Chhide
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Even if we do not get a sip of water, at least your scent (presence) should stay.Your arms should not be dismembered, even though the water bag is ripped apart.

urdu transliteration text:
Yeh Magar Ho Na Saka, Tere Baazu Hai Judaa,Mujhpe Hai Tashna-Labi, Tu Na Aaya Ghazi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Sadly, this wasn’t the case - your arms are severed, And I have been extremely thirsty, but you did not come O’ Warrior (Abbas)

urdu transliteration text:
Jab Ridaa Sar Se Chhini, Mai Sadaa Deti Rahi,
Tu Na Aaya Ghazi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: When my veil was being snatched,I kept crying out aloud,but you did not come O’ Warrior (Abbas)

urdu transliteration text:
Dhup Mai Tu Thaa Shajar, Tujhse Aabaad Thaa GharHai Barehna Mera Sar, Kya Nahin Tujhko Khabar
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: You were like a shade for me and my house as lively because of your presence. Now my head is uncovered, don’t you know about my state?

urdu transliteration text:
Ay Alamdaare-Wafaa, Is Behen ko bakhudaTujhse Dhaaras Thi Bari, Tu Na Aaya Ghazi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Oh the trustworthy flag bearer, I swear by God, Your sister had high hopes from you, but you did not come O’ Warrior (Abbas)

urdu transliteration text:
Jab Ridaa Sar Se Chhini, Mai Sadaa Deti Rahi,
Tu Na Aaya Ghazi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: When my veil was being snatched,I kept crying out aloud,but you did not come O’ Warrior (Abbas)

urdu transliteration text:
Aagayi Shaam-e-Alam, Lutgaye Ehle-HaramRet Par Jalti Huwi, Hogaya Thanda Alam
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: The evening of gloom has arrived, and the household of the Prophet have been lootedYour flag lies unattended on the hot plains of Karbala.

urdu transliteration text:
Pursaa Dene Ke Liye, Mujhse Milne Ke LiyeAagaye Baba Ali, Tu Na Aaya Ghazi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: To console and comfort me, My father Ali came, but you did not come O’ Warrior (Abbas)

urdu transliteration text:
Jab Ridaa Sar Se Chhini, Mai Sadaa Deti Rahi,
Tu Na Aaya Ghazi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: When my veil was being snatched,I kept crying out aloud,but you did not come O’ Warrior (Abbas)

urdu transliteration text:
Kya Kahun Sher Mere, Beridaa Hamko Liye Ye Musalmaa(n) Saare, Shehr dar Shehr Gaye
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: How can I tell you, O’ my brave lion, they unveiled us, These so-called Muslims took us from city to city

urdu transliteration text:
Khilqate Kufa Kabhi, Khilqate Shaam KabhiAur Haa(n) Ham Pe Hassi, Tu Na Aaya Ghazi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Sometimes the people of Kufa, and sometimes the people of Shaam laughed at us, but you did not come O’ Warrior (Abbas)

urdu transliteration text:
Jab Ridaa Sar Se Chhini, Mai Sadaa Deti Rahi,
Tu Na Aaya Ghazi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: When my veil was being snatched,I kept crying out aloud,but you did not come O’ Warrior (Abbas)

urdu transliteration text:
Kitni Bebas Thi Behen, Ai Shehenshaahe WafaaNaam Leleke Mera, Jab Ye Zaalim Ne Kahaa
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: How helpless did I feel, O’ the King of Loyalty, When the cruel oppressor would take my name and say:

urdu transliteration text:
Naaz Tha Jispe Tujhe, Ab Bulaaona UsseAur Mai Roti Rahi, Tu Na Aaya Ghazi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: “Call your brother now, who you are so proud of” I stood crying away, but you did not come O’ Warrior (Abbas)

urdu transliteration text:
Jab Ridaa Sar Se Chhini, Mai Sadaa Deti Rahi,
Tu Na Aaya Ghazi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: When my veil was being snatched,I kept crying out aloud,but you did not come O’ Warrior (Abbas)

urdu transliteration text:
Qaid Khaane Mai Qazaa, Jab Sakina Ko MiliDeke Kurte Ka Kafan, Bacchi Dafnaayi Gayi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: In the dark prisons of Shaam, when Sakina passed away, We shrouded her with her own shirt and buried her in the prison itself

urdu transliteration text:
Us Ghari Naam Tera, Surate Naade-AliDukh Mai Dohraati Rahi, Tu Na Aaya Ghazi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: At that time, your name would come to my lips, O’ the Prayer of Ali, I kept complaining about my state, but you did not come O’ Warrior (Abbas)

Jab Ridaa Sar Se Chhini, Mai Sadaa Deti Rahi,
Tu Na Aaya Ghazi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: When my veil was being snatched,I kept crying out aloud,but you did not come O’ Warrior (Abbas)
